title: The Pseudosphere and the Hyperbolic Plane

visual_sequence.observation: The tractrix surface and half-plane model encode the same negative curvature.
The tractrix construction explains the surface of revolution.
Euclidean size changes while hyperbolic radius stays fixed.
Optical geodesics meet the boundary orthogonally.
The models transfer distances through a conformal map.
